transcript: Customer: Hi, this is Susan Diaz. I'm calling because my air handler froze up with ice on the lines. Dispatcher: Hi Susan, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a Lennox, maybe 10 years old. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 101 Pine Street. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out Wednesday afternoon. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

expected_entities.issue: air handler froze up with ice on the lines
expected_entities.equipment: Lennox air handler, maybe 10 years old
